meta.title: 63 · Party game & Charades
meta.description: 63 is a party word-guessing game. One phone, two teams, three rounds! Free on iOS and Android, with packs.63.pt for building your own packs.

hero.sub: One phone, two teams, three rounds. Get your team to guess as many cards as you can, 63 seconds at a time.

how.lead: Across three rounds, teams take turns guessing as many cards as they can in 63 seconds. Every round has its own rules.

rounds.title: Describe!
rounds.body: You can't use the words from the card's title, but everything else is fair game.
rounds.clue: Christmas movie about being left solo in a house!

rounds.title: One Word!
rounds.body: No gestures, no sounds, no title words. You get exactly one word to nail it.

rounds.title: Charades!
rounds.body: Gestures and sounds only. By now you know every card, so this'll be a breeze.

make.lead: Inside jokes, your friend group, a stag night deck. Write cards in the browser, co-write with friends, and share with a link.

features.title: Create
features.body: Create as many packs and cards as you want, right in the browser.

features.title: Collaborate
features.body: Write with as many people as you want, everyone adding cards in real time.

features.title: Share
features.body: Send your pack to a friend with a link, or publish it for the whole community.

community.lead: Decks made by the community, in multiple languages, with new ones landing all the time. Add as many as you like and mix them into the same game.
community.free: Every pack is free. No paywalls.

final.title: Download now.
final.sub: Free on iOS and Android. No accounts, no paywalls.

footer.blurb:
Your new favourite party game.
Made in Porto 🇵🇹
footer.packsBlurb: Write your own decks in the browser and share them with your friends.
